## Meeting Purpose

[Peer interview to assess Hailey Eberle's AI and operational experience.](https://fathom.video/share/3ypYz-gk6BpswcdJz2UL3pP3ur5zuymd?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**AI-Driven Efficiency:** Hailey Eberle uses AI (e.g., ChatGPT) to automate tasks, like creating board slides from Looker/QuickSight data, enabling a lean New Ventures team at ThredUp to operate at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/3ypYz-gk6BpswcdJz2UL3pP3ur5zuymd?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [**Critical Oversight Required:** AI outputs require manual validation. A recent board slide draft failed to include a key operating expense in its revenue calculation, highlighting the need for human oversight to catch business-specific errors.](https://fathom.video/share/3ypYz-gk6BpswcdJz2UL3pP3ur5zuymd?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [**Process Automation:** Hailey built an agent to streamline project requests from Slack → Asana, creating structured tasks for engineers in Ukraine to bridge time zones and improve workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/3ypYz-gk6BpswcdJz2UL3pP3ur5zuymd?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
  - [**George Haikal's CoS Role:** George Haikal's CoS role at growthx.ai (92 people, remote-first) involves building scalable systems like the ICP framework and the 8-week Strategy Sprint onboarding, which has now served 40 clients.](https://fathom.video/share/3ypYz-gk6BpswcdJz2UL3pP3ur5zuymd?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

## Topics

### Hailey Eberle's Role & AI Workflow at ThredUp

  - [**Role:** New Ventures team at ThredUp, evaluating new business ideas and running pilots.](https://fathom.video/share/3ypYz-gk6BpswcdJz2UL3pP3ur5zuymd?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [**AI as a "Personal Assistant":** Uses AI to manage a high workload, from financial modeling to data storytelling for board presentations.](https://fathom.video/share/3ypYz-gk6BpswcdJz2UL3pP3ur5zuymd?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [**Board Slide Creation Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/3ypYz-gk6BpswcdJz2UL3pP3ur5zuymd?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
      - [**Input:** Uploads data dashboards (PDFs from Looker, QuickSight) to ChatGPT.](https://fathom.video/share/3ypYz-gk6BpswcdJz2UL3pP3ur5zuymd?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
      - [**Prompt:** Requests a narrative and 2026 forecast, specifying key metrics (e.g., GMV).](https://fathom.video/share/3ypYz-gk6BpswcdJz2UL3pP3ur5zuymd?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
      - [**Output:** Receives a draft narrative, which is then refined and integrated into slides.](https://fathom.video/share/3ypYz-gk6BpswcdJz2UL3pP3ur5zuymd?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [**AI Limitations & Oversight:**](https://fathom.video/share/3ypYz-gk6BpswcdJz2UL3pP3ur5zuymd?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
      - [**Problem:** A board slide draft excluded a key operating expense from the net revenue calculation.](https://fathom.video/share/3ypYz-gk6BpswcdJz2UL3pP3ur5zuymd?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
      - [**Cause:** The AI lacked specific knowledge of ThredUp's consignment-based business model.](https://fathom.video/share/3ypYz-gk6BpswcdJz2UL3pP3ur5zuymd?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
      - [**Action:** Hailey identified and corrected the error, emphasizing that AI requires human oversight for accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/3ypYz-gk6BpswcdJz2UL3pP3ur5zuymd?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [**Process Automation Example:**](https://fathom.video/share/3ypYz-gk6BpswcdJz2UL3pP3ur5zuymd?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
      - [**Goal:** Automate the workflow for cleaning rejected, stained products.](https://fathom.video/share/3ypYz-gk6BpswcdJz2UL3pP3ur5zuymd?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
      - [**Process:** AI scans product tags/brands → generates a manifest → shared with an external vendor.](https://fathom.video/share/3ypYz-gk6BpswcdJz2UL3pP3ur5zuymd?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Reduces manual data entry and improves efficiency in the distribution centers.](https://fathom.video/share/3ypYz-gk6BpswcdJz2UL3pP3ur5zuymd?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)

### George Haikal's CoS Role at growthx.ai

  - [**Company:** growthx.ai, 92 people, remote-first with a South Park office for leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/3ypYz-gk6BpswcdJz2UL3pP3ur5zuymd?tab=summary&timestamp=1842.0)
  - [**Role Evolution:** Started as a generalist post-Series A, progressing to CoS by working on the CEO's (Marcel) most critical priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/3ypYz-gk6BpswcdJz2UL3pP3ur5zuymd?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
  - [**Key Projects:**](https://fathom.video/share/3ypYz-gk6BpswcdJz2UL3pP3ur5zuymd?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
      - [**ICP Framework:** Built a framework to define the ideal customer, reducing churn and improving team efficiency by ensuring a better client fit.](https://fathom.video/share/3ypYz-gk6BpswcdJz2UL3pP3ur5zuymd?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
      - [**Strategy Sprint Onboarding:** Developed an 8-week onboarding system to provide a structured handoff from sales to execution, now used for all new clients.](https://fathom.video/share/3ypYz-gk6BpswcdJz2UL3pP3ur5zuymd?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)
      - [**Custom Clients:** Currently focused on experimenting with custom client engagements to identify new value-add services and build out that function.](https://fathom.video/share/3ypYz-gk6BpswcdJz2UL3pP3ur5zuymd?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**growthx.ai:** Contact Hailey Eberle with next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/3ypYz-gk6BpswcdJz2UL3pP3ur5zuymd?tab=summary&timestamp=1913.0)
  - [**Hailey Eberle:** Await follow-up email.](https://fathom.video/share/3ypYz-gk6BpswcdJz2UL3pP3ur5zuymd?tab=summary&timestamp=1932.0)
